case_title: ALFARO, MICHAEL vs. INTERNATIONAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT AKA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT AKA INTERNATIONAL RESTURANT EQUIPMENT SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO, MICHAEL
DEFENDANT FIRST APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT LIMITIACO, TONY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIMITIACO, TONY
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO, MICHAEL COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-18-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-13-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL
DEFENDANT'S IN-LIMINE MOTION TO STRIKE AT-ISSUE MEMORANDUM AND BRIEF RE IMPROPER CALCULATION OF ESTIMATED RENT FILED BY DEFENDANT.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN: DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO STRIKE AT-ISSUE MEMORANDUM DUE TO PROCEEDURAL DEFECT (AT-ISSUE SERVED BEFORE ANSWER FILED; IMPROPER SERVICE: SERVED ON DEFT AND NOT SERVED ON DEFT'S COUNSEL) IS GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT POST THE SUM OF $750 INTO TRUST ACCOUNT OF PLTF COUNSEL L.GRUNER BY 3PM TODAY (FOR 20 DAYS PER DIEM DAMAGES)

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: AFTER DISCUSSION BETWEEN PARTIES FOLLOWING COURT'S STRIKING OF AT-ISSUE MEMO, PARTIES NOW STIPULATE THAT THE CASE IS NOW AT ISSUE AND FILING OF A NEW AT-ISSUE MEMO IS NOT NECESSARY. PARTIES STIP TO NEW DATE FOR TRIAL AND WAIVE NOTICE. COURT ALSO ORDERS THAT IF THE $750 DAMAGES IS NOT POSTED BY DEFT BY 3PM, PLTF MAY BRING AN EX-PARTE MOT TO DEPT 1 WITH AN OST TO ADVANCE TRIAL DATE & DEFT MAY BE SANCTIONED FOR PLTF'S ATNYS FEES.

#6 JDG LITTLE; S SAWYER/CSR; G VAN HEST/CLERK. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIP FOR JUDGMENT OF PREMISES AND STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO OTHER CONDITIONS READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION ONLY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.33 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT AKA INTERNATIONAL RESTURANT EQUIPMENT LIMITIACO, TONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2586 THIRD ST, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION ONLY
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
